title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - HDFC Life Insurance - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Life Insurance! We are hiring a Senior Financial Analyst for our Mumbai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Life Insurance:
HDFC Life Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Life Insurance!
